evaluation.summary: The experiment failed to execute due to a SyntaxError caused by invalid Python syntax '!@#$!' at the start of the script, producing no research results.
next_directions: Correct the invalid syntax '!@#$!' in the experiment script to enable execution.
Fix apparent typos in the problem statement (e.g., 'Base-1' likely meant 'Base-10').
Re-run the experiment after resolving syntax issues and validate Markovian transition computations.
